User.title: User
User.description: User profile with course enrollments, bookmarks, progress details, and personal study configurations.

uid.description: Unique user ID matches authentication identifier.

enrollments.description: Enrolled courses metadata with intake statuses.

bookmarks.description: List of course IDs bookmarked by the user.

progress.description: Index map tracking completed topics per course.

bio.description: A short description of the student.

studyBackground.description: Student Islamic or general academic background.

ageGroup.description: Age bracket for tailored course suggestions.

CourseForm.title: CourseForm
CourseForm.description: Tracks administrative Google Form bindings for admissions.

TriggeredEmail.title: TriggeredEmail
TriggeredEmail.description: Automated welcome emails triggered by Firebase Cloud Functions emulation upon enrollment.

studentUid.description: Reference to the student's unique user ID.

emailBody.description: Personalized email message HTML generated via server-side Gemini.

status.description: Delivery status of the email: sent.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: A testimonial submitted by a student for completed courses, pending admin review.

studentUid.description: Unique user ID of the student.

ContactSubmission.title: ContactSubmission
ContactSubmission.description: A submission made via the Admissions Inquiry Contact Form.

phone.description: Optional phone number of the inquirer.

topic.description: The category or topic of interest.

message.description: Detailed question or case inquiry message text.

channel.description: Preferred contact channel: email or whatsapp.

WhatsAppInquiry.title: WhatsAppInquiry
WhatsAppInquiry.description: A WhatsApp quick inquiry logged upon clicking the chat launcher.

message.description: Custom initial question or click statement.

courseTitle.description: Optional course name related to the launcher context.

status.description: Case tracking status: initiated or resolved.

submittedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the quick log entry.

FAQ.title: FAQ
FAQ.description: A frequently asked question and answer item stored in Firestore.

category.description: Category of the FAQ, e.g., General, Admissions, Curriculum, Technical.

courseId.description: Optional ID of a specific course this FAQ relates to.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the FAQ was created.

users/{userId}.description: Contains user registration profiles, bookmarks, and course progress records.

course_forms/{courseId}.description: Links course syllabi to admin-managed Google intake forms.

triggered_emails/{emailId}.description: Stores copies of automated enrollment notification emails generated by Cloud Functions.

testimonials/{testimonialId}.description: Student testimonials submitted for course completion, reviewed by administrators.

contact_submissions/{submissionId}.description: Inquiries submitted via the admissions contact form.

whatsapp_inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Quick chat logs of inquiries initiated through WhatsApp buttons.

faqs/{faqId}.description: Frequently asked questions for potential students.
